rationale: Educ. Code §28.0216 governs school district grading policies. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district shall adopt a grading policy, including provisions for the assignment of grades on class assignments and examinations, before each school year.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule concerns student grading policies and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
